lines.english: What is Debbie going to try to do?
lines.raw: What is Debbie going to try to do? | 黛比将要尝试做什么？

lines.english: Debbie Hart is going to swim
lines.raw: Debbie Hart is going to swim | 黛比·哈特将于

lines.english: across the English Channel tomorrow.
lines.raw: across the English Channel tomorrow. | 明天横渡英吉利海峡。

lines.english: She is going to set out from the French coast
lines.raw: She is going to set out from the French coast | 她将于明天凌晨5点

lines.english: at five o'clock in the morning.
lines.raw: at five o'clock in the morning. | 从法国海岸出发。

lines.english: Debbie is only eleven years old
lines.raw: Debbie is only eleven years old | 黛比年仅11岁，

lines.english: and she hopes to set up a new world record.
lines.chinese: 她希望能创造一个新的世界纪录。
lines.raw: and she hopes to set up a new world record. | 她希望能创造一个新的世界纪录。

lines.english: She is a strong swimmer and many people feel
lines.chinese: 她是一名出色的游泳运动员，许多人觉得
lines.raw: She is a strong swimmer and many people feel | 她是一名出色的游泳运动员，许多人觉得

lines.english: that she is sure to succeed.
lines.raw: that she is sure to succeed. | 她一定会成功。

lines.english: Debbie's father will set out with her
lines.chinese: 黛比的父亲将与她一起
lines.raw: Debbie's father will set out with her | 黛比的父亲将与她一起

lines.english: in a small boat.
lines.raw: in a small boat. | 乘一艘小船出发。

lines.english: Mr. Hart has trained his daughter for years.
lines.chinese: 哈特先生训练他的女儿已经多年了。
lines.raw: Mr. Hart has trained his daughter for years. | 哈特先生训练他的女儿已经多年了。

lines.english: Tomorrow he will be watching her anxiously
lines.chinese: 明天，他将焦急地看着她
lines.raw: Tomorrow he will be watching her anxiously | 明天，他将焦急地看着她

lines.english: as she swims the long distance to England.
lines.chinese: 游过那漫长的距离去英国。
lines.raw: as she swims the long distance to England. | 游过那漫长的距离去英国。

lines.english: Debbie intends to take short rests every two hours.
lines.chinese: 黛比打算每两小时短暂停歇一次。
lines.raw: Debbie intends to take short rests every two hours. | 黛比打算每两小时短暂停歇一次。

lines.english: She will have something to drink
lines.raw: She will have something to drink | 她会喝些东西，

lines.english: but she will not eat any solid food.
lines.raw: but she will not eat any solid food. | 但不吃任何固体食物。

lines.english: Most of Debbie's school friends will be
lines.chinese: 黛比的大部分同学都将
lines.raw: Most of Debbie's school friends will be | 黛比的大部分同学都将

lines.english: waiting for her on the English coast.
lines.raw: waiting for her on the English coast. | 在英国海岸等候她。

lines.english: Among them will be Debbie's mother,
lines.raw: Among them will be Debbie's mother, | 其中包括黛比的母亲，

lines.english: who swam the Channel herself
lines.chinese: 她本人在还是个女孩的时候
lines.raw: who swam the Channel herself | 她本人在还是个女孩的时候

lines.english: when she was a girl.
lines.raw: when she was a girl. | 也曾游过英吉利海峡。
